titleStmt.title: SII 38.418: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 418. (A.R. No. 418 of 1912.) VAḺUVŪR, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Parakēśarivarmaṉ alias Tribhuvanachakravartin Rājarāja II. Year 11: 1157 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler, pūmaruviya.

Partly damaged. It records that the worshipping priests (śivabrāhmaṇas) of thirty days cycle (muppadu-vaṭṭam), Māḍilan Kāḍan Rājēndrachōḻan alias Kērāḷantaka Bhaṭṭaṉ, Māḍilan Andaṇark ••••••, Kērāḷantaka Bhaṭṭaṉ Perun Tiruveṇkāḍu-uḍaiyāṉ Nambi alias Kērāḷantaka Bhaṭṭaṉ, and Kumaran Amudhan Amudhakumaran alias Nānūṟṟuva-Bhaṭṭaṉ received ten kāśu from Kavśikan Śīdēvan Uyyakkoṇḍān for burning a perpetual lamp at Tiruvīraṭṭānam-uḍaiyar temple at Vaḻugūr, a brahmadāyam in Tiruveḻundūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The inscription further records that during the same period Pudukkuḍaiyān Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ made a gift of some kāśu to Śivakkōḻundu Bhaṭṭaṉ for a lamp.

The inscription then records that during the sixth regnal year of the predecessor of the king (periyedēvar), viz., Vikramachōḷa (1124 A.D.), Arumbākiḻār Toṇḍaimāṉ and Āvūr-uḍaiyūr Sōḻakōnār made gifts of twelve kāśu each for burning two perpetual lamps. These two earlier transactions were recorded in stone during the time of Rājarāja II though the gift was made earlier, ie., during the reign of Vikramachōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātuñ jayamātuñ nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantupulka Aru
maṟaiviti neṟiyaṉaittun=taḻaippa varumuṟaiyurimai maṇimuṭicūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭaitticaikkaḷiṟeṭṭum taṅ
ku tanik kūṭan tānena viḷaṅka karuṅkalippaṭṭiyaic ceṅkol turappa poruṅkatirāḻi pulivaḷarntuṭan varavilla
vari raṭṭavar minavar ciṅkaḷar pallavar nutaliya pāttivar ḷiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpa maṇṇakam puṇarntu cempoṉ virasiṁ
[hā]sanattup puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāna tripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrī rācarājadevaṟ(k)ku yāṇṭu 10 1Āvatu jayaṅ
koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruveḻuntūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam vaḻukūr Uṭai
yār tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyār koyiṟ can=tirātittavaṟ Eri
kkaikku Ikkoyil muppatuvaṭṭattuk kāṇiuṭaiya civappirāma
ṇar māṭilan kāṭan Irācentiracoḻanāna keraḷāntakapaṭṭan
māṭilan kumaranamutanāna tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭan māṭilan An=taṇark ka
m keraḷāntakapaṭṭan perun tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyān nampiyāna keraḷāntakapaṭṭanum kumaranamutan
Amutakumaranāna nānūṟṟuvapaṭṭanum kauśikan citevan Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ
yāṇṭār vaitta tirunantāviḷakku Onṟuku Oṭukkina kācu 10 pattum . § śrīrājarājadevaṟkup patinonṟāvatu putukkuṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān vaitta tirunan=tāviḷakku Onṟu
Itu civakkoḻuntupaṭṭanum pakkal kācu kuṭuttu periyadevar vikkiramacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu Arumpākiḻār toṇṭai mā
vai(y)tta tirunantā viḷakku Onṟukku Oṭukkina kācu 10 2 panniraṇṭum Āvuṭaiyār coḻakonār vaitta tirunantāviḷakku O
nṟukku Oṭukkina kācu 10 2 panniraṇṭum Āka kācu 2 10 4 Irupatti nālukku Erittuvarukiṟa tirunan=tāviḷakku Iraṇṭum Ivarkaḷ pakkaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.418 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
